title: Induction on Rank — BSD(k) Implies BSD(k+1)

analysis.object: T883: Induction on Rank — BSD(k) Implies BSD(k+1) depth analysis

base_cases.description: BSD rank 0: Kolyvagin (EML-3 Euler system). BSD rank 1: Gross-Zagier (LUC-38). BSD rank 2: T880. Three base cases.

inductive_hypothesis.description: IH: BSD holds for rank k (rank = analytic rank, Sha finite, formula correct)

inductive_step_points.description: Step: for rank k+1 curve, Hodge gives k+1 algebraic cycles -> k+1 rational points (T872 generalized)

inductive_step_sha.description: Step: Sha finite for rank k+1 via (k+1)-variable Euler system (Zhang at level k+1)

inductive_step_analytic.description: Step: L^{(k+1)}(E,1) != 0 -> analytic rank = k+1 by IH + one more zero

inductive_step_formula.description: Step: BSD formula at k+1 follows from IH formula + one more factor

t883_theorem.description: T883: INDUCTION ON RANK. BSD(k) -> BSD(k+1) via: Hodge (k+1 points) + Zhang Euler system (Sha finite) + formula extension. T883.

analysis.theorem: T883: Induction on Rank — BSD(k) Implies BSD(k+1) (S1163).

key_theorem: T883: Induction on Rank — BSD(k) Implies BSD(k+1) (S1163).
